reviews.text:
I can't speak highly enough about Ian, who has been my go-to attorney and trusted advisor for the past 6-7 years. Whether it's a complex legal matter or a simple question, he's always been there with the expertise and guidance I need.

My initial experience with Ian was during a shareholder dispute issue, and he handled it with such finesse and precision that I knew I had found someone truly reliable. Since then, he's become not just my attorney but also someone I confidently refer to my clients when they require legal assistance. The feedback from my clients has been consistently positive, which speaks volumes about Ian's exceptional legal acumen.

One of Ian's most outstanding qualities is his unwavering attention to detail. He leaves no stone unturned, ensuring that every aspect of a case is thoroughly examined. But what truly sets Ian apart is his commitment to his clients' best interests. He doesn't follow the typical attorney stereotype of pushing clients towards costly trials just to increase his billing. Instead, he empathizes with their situation and recommends the most financially beneficial decisions for their business, even if it means billing less as their attorney. This level of integrity and dedication is a rare find in the legal profession.

Referring Ian to clients not only makes me feel safe but also enhances my own professional reputation. It's reassuring to know that my clients are in the capable hands of an attorney who genuinely cares about their well-being. Ian's expertise, attention to detail, and financial prudence make him the ideal choice for any legal matter.

I wholeheartedly recommend Ian to anyone seeking a trustworthy attorney with a track record of excellence. Thank you, Ian, for consistently going above and beyond in providing top-notch legal counsel!
Highly recommend!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks so much! Really appreciate you taking the time to recommend us.

reviews.text: We had a bad car accident and Deldar Legal helped us when the other persons at FAULT insurance wanted to deny the claim, this team is very knowledgeable & extremely helpful, they didn't take no for an answer from the at FAULT insurance. Thanks to Delgar Legal we can move on from this unfortunate experience. Thank you Delgar Legal!

I had a car accident in August 2023 and heard about Deldar Legal from a friend. I had to deal with injury attorneys in the past. Those whom you get no information from, no communication... they don't pick up your phones after you sign the agreement with them. They don't answer your questions and you are not even sure if they have bothered to really fight for you. Deldar Legal is exactly the opposite.
Stephany was the person of contact for me. She is kind, she is smart, and she guided me through the steps I needed to take with patience, the doctors I needed to visit and treatments I needed to receive. She made everything so easy and free of stress, so I could focus on healing. I never had a question unanswered, never felt I was lost and never felt Deldar Legal would stop fighting for me before they can the gain the best for me.
I had the best experience with them, and I recommend them to everyone in need of such services.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Rama! We're delighted to hear that Stephany was able to provide the support and guidance you needed during such a stressful time. We wish you good health moving forward!

reviews.text: I called twice to inquire about my case but the first time I called some lady answered and took down my information but she didn’t tell me when I would get a call back. First impressions are everything and so far this office has horrible customer service and little to no urgency on getting back to potential or prospective clients; horrible customer service!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your comment.  I truly apologize you were not able to speak with me and utilize my services.  I did get your message.  However, after a review of your request provided by my office staff I immediately realized I would not be able to help with your case.  Instead of use more of your time and return the call I decided to work on my other cases I currently have.  I also responded to you directly after your review and it is unfortunate you also did not respond.  I apologize you were not able to discuss with me about obtaining my services or how I help many of my clients with the various cases they bring to me.  All my clients, both current and prospective are important to me and I try my best to communicate and keep every client that hires me up to date with the information on their case.  While I cannot claim to be perfect on that, I do try and communicate at every opportunity with my clients.  Since the  field of criminal defense is a large area, there are some cases I choose not to handle for various reasons. I have handled many felony and misdemeanor cases over my 15 years of legal practice.   Your case did not seem like the kind my office could take on.  Out of respect for your privacy, I will not discuss in greater detail why I do not take on that kind of case. After speaking with a client or reviewing their type of case I am able to choose which cases I am most competent to handle and clients that are willing to work with me for the best results.  Thank you for reaching out to my office.  I wish you all the best with your case and hope you were able to find someone that could help you with that specific type of issue.

I hired David Kestner to handle my probate case, and I couldn't be more satisfied with his representation. Our case was quite complicated, especially because my brother objected to the petition in court. Despite the challenges, David handled every aspect with exceptional professionalism.
What impressed me most was his confidence in court - he knew the law inside and out and advocated effectively on my behalf. Even with the opposition we faced, David was able to navigate the situation skillfully, and the judge granted everything we requested.
Beyond his legal expertise, David was genuinely kind and compassionate throughout the entire process. Probate can be an emotionally difficult time, especially when family members are in conflict, and his caring approach made a real difference during this challenging period.
If you need a probate attorney who combines legal skill with genuine human decency, I highly recommend David Kestner.
Excellent lawyer

I can’t say enough great things about working with Attorney David Kestner. From the very start, it was clear he genuinely cared about my case and wanted the best outcome for me. He took the time to really listen to my concerns, explain the process in plain terms, and make sure I felt supported every step of the way.

What stood out the most was how dedicated and attentive he was. Any time I had a question or needed an update, he was quick to respond and made me feel like a priority. His expertise and experience were obvious, and the strategy he put together was rock solid. Thanks to him, we got a fantastic result that I couldn’t be happier with.

Another big plus is how approachable and reasonable he is. The free consultation and fair pricing made everything much less stressful. It’s clear he’s passionate about helping people and making the legal process as smooth as possible.

If you’re looking for a lawyer who’s not only smart and professional but also genuinely cares about your case, David Kestner is your guy. I’d recommend him to anyone in a heartbeat!

reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for sharing your experience with us. We regret to hear about the challenges your father faced, and we want you to know that we've taken your feedback to heart. We take client satisfaction very seriously, and it’s always our goal to provide clear communication and responsive service. The issues you mentioned were related to a former team member, and since then, we've worked to enhance communication to better serve our clients. Thank you again for your feedback.

We value all feedback as an opportunity to improve, and we’re continually working to strengthen our client communication and support. If you’d like to discuss this further, please reach out—we’d welcome the chance to address any remaining concerns directly. Thank you again for bringing this to our attention and helping us improve.

My wife and I were involved in an automobile accident that pushed our car nearly 100 feet. We sustained injuries that required medical attention. After feeling like nothing could be done, John not only worked with insurance and medical professionals to get us the help and support we needed, but he treated us like family. Throughout the process, John kept us informed and made us feel secure. John was incredibly helpful, supportive, and professional throughout, and I truly appreciate his dedication. I highly recommend him to anyone in need of a top-notch lawyer.

I am beyond grateful for the incredible service and results I received from Metri Law Group. Being involved in an accident is overwhelming enough, but dealing with insurance companies, medical bills, and the legal process can feel impossible without the right help. Thankfully, I found Metri Law Group, and they turned one of the most stressful times in my life into something manageable—and ultimately, successful.

From my very first consultation, I could tell they were different from other firms. They treated me with compassion and respect, took the time to understand every detail of my accident, and explained the process step by step so I knew exactly what to expect. I never felt rushed or like “just another case.” They were patient, kind, and always willing to answer even my smallest questions.

What really stood out was how aggressively they fought for me against the insurance company. They knew the tactics adjusters use to undervalue claims, and they pushed back every time to make sure I was treated fairly. They gathered evidence, communicated directly with my doctors, and built such a strong case that the insurance company had no choice but to take it seriously.

The result was far better than I ever imagined. My settlement not only covered my medical bills and lost wages but also gave me peace of mind moving forward. I truly believe that without Metri Law Group, I would have ended up with much less.

Beyond the outcome, what impressed me most was the personal attention I received. I was always updated on the progress of my case, and I never had to wonder what was happening behind the scenes. The team’s professionalism, honesty, and commitment were consistent from start to finish.

If you’ve been in an accident and are searching for a lawyer you can trust to fight for you, I cannot recommend Metri Law Group enough. They combine deep legal expertise with compassion and genuine care for their clients. Choosing them was the best decision I could have made after my accident, and I am truly thankful for everything they did for me.

John helped me with my car accident personal injury case and was incredibly knowledgeable in this space. He proposed creative solutions, was diligent, patient, and guided me through the entire process, making it effortless on my end. We successfully closed the case, and I was able to secure a significant settlement. I 100% recommend John to anyone in need of legal support.

My friend, who's worked with John at Metri Law before, introduced me to him, and let me just say, I've never felt this kind of relief talking to a lawyer. John is warm, straightforward, and actually listens.

At first, my chiro had me coming in 3 times a week, but the treatments actually made things worse. I had to go find another doctor to fix what got messed up. Meanwhile, the other party's insurance tried to lowball me with a $3,000 settlement, which didn't even cover the first chiro visits.

John told me, "Let me take care of it," and he really did. A few months later, he calls me up, case closed, better settlement, and everything handled smoothly.

reviews.text: Going through the process of personal injury from an automobile accident has a lot of unknowns as it's not a topic that is well known.  There's an abundance of questions on how to start, what goes on during, and what happens after the court.  That's why you need someone experienced in your corner to help you navigate along the way, but in this case, Sicat Law also does the driving for you so you just sit there and they just fill you in and ask if you have any additional questions.  With a recent accident, there's additional things in your life you need to focus on besides your medical appointments and healing. It's a big headache and it's a huge change to your life.  With Sicat Law they took most of my worries away, and all those were anything about the accident case.  Medical appointments? They scheduled me the closest location, and I also had some choices on locations as well.  Paperwork and medical files? It was all pre done, all I had to do was "sign here" and grab a CD with X-rays that was handed to me as I didn't even have to ask for them.  I felt like a child but in a good way. You know how when you were young and your parents did everything for you? Holding your hand. Well, they were holding my hand throughout everything, and checking up on me from time to time.  It felt kinda nice actually. Worry free.  The professionalism was beyond my expectations and it was like a well oiled machine, no stoppage anywhere, no hiccups,  and no worries.  Even the medical professionals that I had to choose from were good as well.  This wasn't their first rodeo, they knew and set up everything aligning with small gaps of time in between to be more efficient in getting to our goal.  Although professional, they also added a side of comfort as of you were talking to a friend.  You can tell when people are fake.  The people I dealt with were very genuine and caring.  They even gave additional advice on ways to improve my well-being during my recovery.  Usually legal stuff is a pain, but the conversations were always added knowledge and interesting.  I was never lost during the process, as they were guiding me along the way. Through Jocelyn Sicat's years of experience in Criminal Justice, I believe that's what have an edge to her effectiveness.  That's years in court, knowing the process, and the law itself.  That's who you want to navigate, someone who's like Google maps in the world of Personal Injury cases and also Criminal Justice depending on your needs.  I also had some other legal questions on different topics and she was able to get me to the right people to help my mother.  How's that for versatility? All with a smile and sincereness. Family. That's what Sicat Law feels like.  I also had some of my friends call her and see if she could help them.  If she wasn't able to, she gave reason why and also a list of choices on how to proceed.  That epitomizes that she has what you want, someone that knows where to find the answer and also what to do and where to go of she isn't able to assist. That shows she cares.  It's a no brainer folks.  I don't even know why you wouldn't want Sicat Law to represent you.  It all boils down to one question... Do you want to be "Taken" or "Taken care of"?!  I chose to be taken care of, so I chose Sicat Law.  Say hi to Jocelyn for me when you talk to her.

Attorney Jocelyn Sicat is by far the best. She works quickly communicates everything with you never leaving you in the dark. Her staff are the best at what they do investigatin and updating you every step of the way. Sicat law is who you want to have on your side. Thank you for what you and all your staff has done.

Dear Attorney Samuel E. Tyre:

Dear Sir/Madam, I extend my deepest gratitude to you throughout this long and arduous legal process!

Faced with misunderstanding and framing, it was your exceptional professional competence, unwavering conviction, and extraordinary wisdom that upheld the truth and defended justice for me.

Throughout the trial, you consistently focused on the facts and adhered to the law,

using calm reasoning and precise logic to gradually reveal the truth and restore the facts.

Your arguments were clear and powerful, and your defense was composed and confident,

winning not only the respect of the court and the jury but also ensuring that truth was rediscovered in the solemn courtroom.

I deeply admire your professionalism, ethical conduct, and humanistic concern as a lawyer.

In my most difficult moments, you did not treat my case as merely a "case,"

but rather, with sincerity and a sense of responsibility, devoted all your energy and wisdom to speaking out for me and fighting for justice.

You made the voice of justice heard, and restored my faith in the dignity of the law and the brilliance of humanity.

Thank you for all your efforts and dedication—it was because of your professional defense and unwavering conviction that the jury unanimously found you not guilty.

This is not only a victory for the law, but also a victory for justice and truth.

May you continue to shine in your future legal career,

becoming a guardian of more innocent people,

a defender of social justice and the rule of law.

May your wisdom and kindness be seen by more people, and may God remember and bless you.
reviews.ownerResponse: I was proud to stand up for you and get you the not guilty verdict you deserved. Thank you for your kind words.

First Sam got the charges reduced to a misdemeanor & then got the DA to agree to dismiss the charges without my wife pleading to anything. Excellent result, Sam! Thanks for getting this scary monkey off our backs & for even getting the criminal restraining order officially terminated. Sam is intelligent & focused, has a quick grasp of complicated facts, is totally reliable for court appearances & paperwork & is a well-spoken, respected advocate in court for his clients.

Talk about an attitude!  This firm serves someone incorrectly and will not be the least apologetic after causing distress to the individual they served!   But don't try to explain  yourself because Deedra Van Strien will tell you she's got 23 years experience.  Perhaps she's a frustrated Litigation Paralegal who desires to be an attorney.  Most customer or client centric companies will come across apologetic and take ownership of their mistake to quickly resolve things for the person they inconvenienced.    As the individual that was wrongfully attacked and being rightfully upset, Deedra raises her voice to tell us to take a better attitude or she'll hang up and let us figure out what to do.  What a piece of work!    Well, if you're considering Paliwoda & Paliwoda to handle your vehicle accident case or have an injury claim resulting from an auto accident you might consider contacting someone else.   I'm sure Deedra's attitude is only professional when it suits HER and the $$ that Paliwoda and Paliwoda speculates they'll receive.    So, Deedra, I will figure out what needs to be done.  But hopefully prospective clients will review this and have second thoughts on retaining Paliwoda and Paliwoda for their injury related or auto accident case!   Go figure this one out.. HA!

When he had an appointment in Ciudad Juárez, they denied it because the lawyer hadn't given him good advice, and now he's barred from practicing law in Mexico for ten years.
A great experience. Everything went EXACTLY as attorney Nieblas indicated. He treated us like family! His prices are extremely reasonable. Thank you so much!!!

my friend was deported because this man didn't advise him as he should have.

My husband and I traveled from San Francisco for a 3:00 p.m. immigration appointment, but due to heavy traffic, we arrived four minutes late. To our surprise, the front desk attendant informed us we would have to wait until after the 4:30 p.m. appointment, despite the other party offering to let us in first. It was literally 3:06 p.m., and the other party was still filling out their paperwork. The attendant then demanded we pay in cash, even though they had initially said it was preferred but not required. When they realized the other party was willing to let us in, they suddenly insisted they only accepted cash. We never saw the attorney, and we left feeling like they had wasted our time and energy. It was incredibly unprofessional. If the schedule was that strict, they should have mentioned it when booking the appointment. I wouldn't trust an establishment that treats potential clients this way.

My husband and I traveled all the way from San Francisco for a 3:00 p.m. immigration appointment, but due to heavy traffic, we arrived four minutes late. To our surprise, the front desk assistant informed us that we would have to wait until after a 4:30pm appointment, despite the other party offering to let us go first. The time was literally 3:06pm, and the other party was still filling out paperwork. The assistant then demanded cash payment upfront, even though they initially said it was preferred but not mandatory. Once they realized the other party was willing to let us go ahead, they suddenly insisted on cash only. We never saw the lawyer and walked out feeling like we had wasted our time and energy. This was incredibly unprofessional. If the timing was this strict, they should have mentioned it when we booked the appointment. I wouldn't trust an establishment that treats potential clients this poorly.
reviews.ownerResponse: I am very sorry you experienced this situation. We try to accommodate everyone as best as we can. We were waiting on you and when you did not call or arrive at the scheduled appointment time, other waiting clients were ready to enter. Despite our efforts to assure you that you would been seen in a few minutes, you decided to leave. We can certainly reschedule you for another appointment by phone to lessen your travel. Thank you.

reviews.text:
I would like to take this opportunity to Thank Attorney Guadalupe T. Garcia as she has provided her outstanding expertise, commitment, and dedication throughout my fiancé immigration process.  I must also acknowledge her staff who deserve many accolades as they attributed to ensure all my/our family questions were answered and were prompt with responses especially when the process was extremely challenging. Attorney Garcia exemplifies empathy in the moments of despair she helped us feel reassured as she provided awareness and knowledge about issues, as various steps through the immigration process arose.

Her commitment to deliver exemplary service with the most upright professionalism provided a peace of mind to go through this rigorous process.

I would recommend Attorney Guadalupe T Garcia immigration services to everyone who is seeking a professional, knowledgeable,communicative, and empathetic representation.

I'm so glad we were recommended Romben Aquino! My husband and I were looking for an attorney to help us with my green card application. Because of some challenges in my case our previous lawyer recommended us Romben because she believed he had

when you're going into any process like this with USCIS you need someone who will fight for you but also be very honest and not sugarcoat anything. Although our case was challenging and we had to deal with a new administration in office and covid guidelines, Romben and his team was able to prepare our case in the most affectively way possible. We submitted everything March 2022, I had my biometrics in April 2022, we had a RFE in November 2022, they received everything February 27,2023 and I was approved the very next day February 28, 2023 with no interview needed. Romben
and his team made us feel comfortable throughout the whole process, they kept us updated and he made sure our packet was well prepared before sending it off. We
could not be more thankful for all their hard work. We highly highly highly recommend Fong & Aquino!

reviews.ownerResponse: Joey, thank you for allowing me to represent you. You and other members of our armed forces who risk your lives every day to defend this country are the true unsung heroes.  The legislature crafted military diversion for vets like yourself because it recognized the trauma of war.  The Judge got it right in your case, and you did all the heavy lifting.  It is because of you, our vets, and serviceman that our country is safe.  Once again, thank you Joey.

reviews.text:
I don’t usually write reviews, but I really want to thank William Chang. Last year, I was involved in two car accidents in a row, and both cases were extremely difficult.

In the first case, the other party only had a $5,000 policy limit and then basically disappeared. The insurance company wouldn’t budge at all. In the second case, the medical offer was way too low, especially while we were still in pain and dealing with a complicated recovery.

William was patient, responsive, and never treated our situation like a lost cause. He kept us updated, explained everything clearly, and fought for an outcome that actually made sense. He even helped with small claims paperwork when we physically couldn’t handle it ourselves — which was honestly beyond what we expected.

We’re truly grateful for William and the City of Industry team.

I encountered two car accidents last year and the year before last. I was the victim in both car accidents, but it was really difficult to deal with them.一方面对方的保额很低，只有 5,000 美元，后来对方又搬家失联，找不到人，保险公司也只愿意赔五千块，完全没有任何弹性。

在我原本的律师没办法妥善处理之后，我改找张经理这边。张经理真的非常有耐心，也很有爱心和同情心。他定期跟我们联系，沟通案情近况，有任何问题也都会随时回答我的疑问，完全没有敷衍，也没有让我们自己去面对。

第二起车祸主要卡在医疗赔偿。对方保险公司一开始开出来的金额很低，完全没有办法负担我们的恢复。那段时间我们受伤、治疗过程又很繁琐，也承受了很多痛苦，我身体状况不好，精神压力非常大。可是在那样的状况下，张经理还是非常有耐心，帮我跟保险公司来来回回争取，最后替我们拿到一个很好的医疗赔偿。

让我们特别感动的是，因为身体不好，我一直没有能力去处理一些法庭相关的事务，张经理却很有耐心地帮我准备资料、撰写文件，也一步一步告诉我们该怎么做。 Thank you, Manager Zhang, for staying with us and helping us through this difficult situation.

Thank you so much, Manager Zhang (William Chang), and thank you to the entire City of Industry team. We are truly fortunate to have met them, and we are sincerely grateful.

William Zhang is very responsible and patient with clients. He speaks kindly and explains any questions I have, which relieves me of anxiety. Most importantly, he's very capable. He even managed to get the other party to pay more than the insurance amount, and he received a very good settlement. I initially looked for a lawyer, but they were rather passive. I switched to William Zhang, and it seems like it was a good decision.

When William Chang took my case, he said the other party would pay to the fullest extent of the contract. Later, Vitio Eto handled the case personally. After three years of fighting with the other party, the insurance company did indeed pay to the fullest extent of the contract.

The attorney handled everything from start to finish for my accident case. I recommend Vititoe Law Group City of Industry office to all of my friends and family. Especially in southern california with millions of people on the road.
He keeps in touch with you throughout the entire process. Incredibly professional, reliable, and successful are just a few of the words I would use to describe the team.  Don’t let your insurance jiff you of what you deserve. Vititoe Law Group will take care of everything!

Vititoe Law Group is the best! I highly recommend this law firm. They are wonderful and did a great job for me in dealing with my car accident case. From the beginning I was impressed. I am very happy with my outcome and will recommend…

The manager of Vititoe Law group, City of Industry office is extremely dedicated to providing excellent client service. Mr. Vititoe and his office are by far the best firm one could even ask for. I give them a two thumbs up.

It's a shame, because the Westlake office seems so incredibly well-run, but the City of Industry office is probably the exact opposite. The manager William Chang was incredibly deceptive and dishonest, and always beating around the bush when it came to my case (anon review for safety purposes). The office looks like a tornado blew through it as well, with piles of case files lying everywhere. It's a wonder how they get anything done here, when they have such a terrible, unprofessional manager as well as no organization system - it must take them 5 weeks to look for a single case document...

Vititoe Law Group City of Industry team handled my case with diligence and grace.  The attorney and the staff are thorough, patient, professional and caring during the entire process.   Thank you for helping me through this difficult process!

I appreciate the hard work of the staff at Vititoe Law Group in City of Industry, especially manager William. He always give me good answers. I am incredibly pleased by the service we got. I knew I was in good hands. They are diligence, knowledge and professionalism. Thank you!

I am very satisfied with the service we have received from the City of Industry office of Vititoe Law Group. They answered all of my questions quickly and made my case process easy for me. I would definitely recommend this firm to my friends and families. Thank you!
This law office in the City of Industry is one of the best attorneys. They have tons of experience and great work ethic.

The City of Industry office of Vititoe Law Group helped me a lot. The manager literally answered every one of my questions and was always available even after hours. I appreciate the efforts the team has made.

Jim Vititoe is very professional and amazing person to work with. I’m truly blessed that we have the business with him and the rest of the group.

With a situation that definitely left me shaken up, I was made a lot less stressful due to the work of the Vititoe Law Group, City of Industry office . I am very grateful i had them on my side through this awful experience.

Honestly Mr. James Vititoe is really a great attorney! He and his Industry Office team help you as much as they can. They don’t settle for just anything. They got me more! They have great communication and always kept me updated on everything. I really recommend them to help you.

My family and friends all love Vititoe Law Group. Attorney James Vititoe is very nice and experienced. The team he leads at the City of Industry branch is very dedicated, friendly, and approachable. I am very happy today because my wife got her settlement check. In today's business climate, competition is tough. Many companies are looking for any edge they can get, and some will resort to unscrupulous tactics to get ahead.

One of these tactics is leaving negative reviews on a service they have never used.

This is not only unethical, but it can also be illegal.

If you're caught leaving fake reviews, you could face serious consequences from both the company you're targeting and from Google.

Businesses rely on reviews to help them attract new customers and to improve their reputation.

When someone leaves a fake review, it hurts businesses.

If you're considering leaving a negative review for a business, make sure you've actually used their services first, otherwise, you're just being dishonest and unfair.

reviews.text:
I reached out to this firm because my previous attorney was extremely unhelpful. She asked me the same questions every time we met, no paperwork was being completed, and nothing was moving forward. When my son was abused by my ex, we had to file three times for a restraining order, and the process dragged on for over a month. I felt exhausted, helpless, and completely overwhelmed.

I’ll be honest — when I saw that all the Yelp and Google reviews for this firm were excellent, I wondered if they might be too good to be true. But I desperately needed help, so I called. Bryan personally answered the phone and scheduled my first appointment.

After meeting with several attorneys, I chose him — and thank God I did. He is exactly as good as everyone says. He acted quickly, organized all the files and photos, contacted witnesses, and handled everything efficiently within a very limited time frame. Whenever I reached out, he responded promptly and professionally.

I truly appreciate that he runs his own office. I didn’t have to go back and forth between a front desk, paralegal, and multiple staff members — which often leads to endless billing and delays. Communication was direct and clear.

My divorce has now been finalized after three long years of fighting. I was awarded sole custody and other outcomes that I rightfully deserved. I could not have done this without Bryan’s help.

The process was painful and difficult, but having a dedicated attorney who stays on top of the case and genuinely puts in the effort makes all the difference.

Thank you, Bryan and Kenny.

Kenny was helped me in my child custody and support case he was very informative and communicative. He fought for me and we were successful. Whenever I had questions he would always clarify and see the best route to take during this difficult process. I definitely would come back to him again if in the future there is a situation where I need his help. Would recommend him to anyone!

I used Lee & Wong for a personal injury accident claim this past year. It was a very easy process to set up and Lee was super communicative and helpful throughout.

The most important thing I was concerned about was getting help with my health, my car back on the street and making sure insurance was being properly handled. Its a lot to navigate when you go through a tough traffic collision so having a lawyer who can be there for you is essential.

Lee made sure all these things happened and got things done in a timely manner. Would definitely recommend them to anyone!

Huge shoutout to Kenny for his outstanding work defending and advocating for me! He was incredibly attentive, always answering my calls and addressing every question I had about the case. Kenny's dedication led to the results I needed, and I highly recommend him to anyone seeking a top-notch lawyer. Thanks again for everything!

I had the pleasure of working with both Kenny Lee and Bryan Wong on a case which dealt with family law.  I first met Mr. Wong  who gave guidance on how to proceed with the case.  Mr. Lee executed all the necessary actions and paperwork  for the case. Both of these gentlemen were extremely efficient and to the point, which is exactly how you want your lawyers to be. They did not waste a moment of my time.  The case was settled quickly and saved me thousands of dollars and many hours of time. I highly recommend Lee & Wong.

Clark

I'd like to express my gratitude for the exceptional service provided by Kenny Lee throughout my divorce proceedings. Facing the complexities of a divorce is no easy feat, but having Kenny by my side truly made all the difference. From the initial consultation to the final resolution, Kenny consistently demonstrated a level of professionalism, expertise, and empathy that surpassed all my expectations.

Throughout the process, Kenny consistently prioritized efficient resolution strategies, avoiding unnecessary litigation whenever possible. He skillfully negotiated on my behalf, seeking mutually beneficial solutions that saved both time and money. His ability to navigate complex legal issues while remaining cognizant of cost considerations was truly commendable. I highly recommend him!

AMAZING! All the 5 star reviews are extremely accurate. Kenny Lee was recommended to me by my cousin and that was a godsend. First let me give you a small reality check, remember that an attorney's time is valuable and they need you to do your part of providing information in a concise manner to be able to work efficiently. No attorney will do everything for you so come down to reality and know that. With that said:

Kenny was available when I needed him (but don't overdo it). On weekends and evenings when I had time to respond to an email or had a question on paperwork I would text him, not expecting anything, and often he would surprise me and respond.  There was a time my ex and I were attempting to work out an agreement over the weekend he was willing to answer questions via text (on the clock of course) but still to have that availability was a game changer. My ex had an old school attorney and  always had to wait for regular business hours to get an answer.

In court is where I realized I had the cream of the crop of attorney. In court I froze. I thought I had prepared myself and knew things inside and out but I froze when the judge asked me questions and Kenny came through. He had things highlighted and he pointed to what I needed to say from my declaration, which refreshed my memory and I was able to stumble through the hearing. It saved me.

In the hearing, I also feel that Kenny's opening statement was the key item that made the case go in my favor. Again, I provided him all the info necessary but he focused on what he knew the court needed to hear. I know I gave him way too much info but he cut out what he needed to and honed in on what was necessary. If you are doing research and torn on which attorney to go with, I promise you (as long as you do your part) you will not be disappointed with choosing Kenny Lee. He knows his stuff, he gives sound advise, and he is available when it counts. I can't express enough how fortunate I feel to have had Kenny represent me. Especially after seeing the type of attorney my ex had I knew for sure I had the better attorney. I can go on forever, and if you're still reading this review I know you are like me and do lots research, just stop looking and feel confident going with Kenny Lee.

I was involved in a traffic collision and sustained minor injuries to my back and neck. One call to this law office and I knew I was in good hands. Kenny walked me through the entire process and in the end helped me receive more money than I expected.

Great guy, super knowledgeable, overall a great experience! If you’re looking for an attorney for a traffic collision look no further and give Kenny a call.

My experience working with Kenny on our prenuptial agreement was outstanding! Kenny's professionalism, expertise, and attention to detail was so impressive and I appreciate the fact that he had time to review everything with me. He helped guide me through the entire process, ensuring that all my concerns and questions were addressed thoroughly. I couldn't have asked for a better attorney to assist me during this important time. Thanks to Kenny, I feel confident and secure as we embark on this new chapter of our lives. Highly recommended!

From the moment I reached out to Kenny for assistance with my custody case, he provided invaluable advice and guidance throughout the entire journey. I cannot express enough gratitude for what he has done, not only for me but also for my family.
Right from day one, Kenny was upfront and honest about the challenges we may face. As a single father seeking custody, I was aware of the uphill battle I was facing, but Kenny's support and strategic advice gave me hope. He advised me to be patient and trust the legal process.
Thanks to Kenny's unwavering efforts, my case played out as it should have. After years of my children residing with me, I was granted full custody. I am thankful to Kenny for his unwavering support and guidance.
Throughout the process, Kenny was not just a lawyer, but a compassionate advocate for my family and me. He genuinely cared about our well-being and the best interests of my children. He navigated the complexities of the legal system with utmost professionalism and provided reassurance during the most challenging times.
I couldn't have achieved this positive outcome without the exceptional support. His legal knowledge, communication skills, and dedication to his clients are truly commendable. If you find yourself in need of legal assistance, especially in a custody battle, I wholeheartedly recommend the Kenny Lee Law Firm.
Kenny, thank you sincerely for your exceptional service and for bringing my family closer together. Your impact on our lives is immeasurable, and I am forever grateful.

Kenny Lee is a phenomenal attorney with great experience. He facilitated my prenup in a timely manner and looked out for my best interests. He was caring, knowledgeable, attentive and made sure everything was handled properly. I highly recommend him!

Kenny Lee was life changing for me. With his help, I was able to file and win an ex-parte (emergency order), he fought for my kid's voices to be heard by a minor's council, and ultimately supported me in being granted full custody. After a long battle for the truth to be heard, I finally found Kenny! He is objective, thoughtful, and honest. He communicates every step of the way, works quickly, and will fight for you! Custody hearings are complicated, so hire someone who knows what they are doing, and cares!

The Law Offices of Lee and Wong are made up of a team of legal professionals that you can put your trust in. I specifically worked with Mr. Kenny Lee who supported me in carrying forth a child custody case. I can honestly say that Mr. Lee carries himself with grace and professionalism. He takes the time to hear your case, patiently answers questions (no matter how simple or complex they may seem from the onset), and is intentional about offering a detailed plan of action to move the case forward. He follows up with his clients and their families in a way that is not overbearing or overwhelming; this was especially crucial because it was the first time my family and I had to engage with the courts in this way. Prior to meeting with Kenny, I had no knowledge whatsoever about what to expect and/or how to proceed in a child-custody case. I felt stuck and a bit lost, but once I began to work with Kenny, I felt confident that he would do everything in his power to win the case in such a way that was favorable for me and my family. I am 100% satisfied with his services, for this reason, he has my highest recommendation. Others who are interested in working with a professional, apt, and very well-prepared lawyer to represent them should feel confident seeking counsel from and working with Mr. Kenny Lee.
Kenny was very knowledgeable and helpful throughout my whole case. Would highly recommend.

This guy had his body guard search me before I could meet with him and leave my phone, keys, and wallet outside. He was clearly worried about being recorded. He also tried to charge me $20,000 for a simple court petition that a better attorney did for $750. Skip the meeting and find somebody else.

Joe is the most unprofessional person I have ever met. I was skeptical upon some of the services he was offering and we had a dispute over the phone. The phone call ended with myself being called some of the most derogatory marks a person can be called. I'm still in disbelief, LOL. His first cold called me, I never even reached out to him. I'm very happy with attorney Coimbra and his team. Everything went perfectly and the outcome was very successful. Highly recommended for anyone wanting to clean up their record.
Attorney Coimbra took care of all the paperwork and dealings with the court for me. I felt at ease knowing that somebody was there to help me and I didn't end up having to go to court on my own.

I’m very impressed by Attorney Joe Coimbra’s Because of him, I now have a SECOND CHANCE at life. I was on that miserable S.O. registry for decades.  I visited other lawyers to try to help me, but none of them had a clue. Some of them even tried to discourage me from trying to get off the registry. I knew to save the best for last so I visited with Attorney Joe Coimbra. He out from the crowd. He’s a walking encyclopedia of the law. Other lawyers were too busy trying to sell me on hiring them. But Joe was just interested in my case and in my cares and concerns. It was obvious Attorney Joe was the right lawyer for my case. Not only did he get me off the registry, he did it in a place that can be VERY tough on RSO’s: Ventura County.  The courthouse here is a rough environment for somebody representing me in my situation. But he got it done. Don’t be a fool: if you’re trying to get out the registry, there’s nobody as capable but Attorney Joe Coimbra. Thank you Joe for giving me a SECOND CHANCE at freedom!

It’s been many years and many tears since I got convicted a crime I didn’t do. I wish I had back then the kind of legal representation I have now because Attorney Joe Coimbra got me off the penal code 290 registry. What an incredibly knowledgeable, caring, humane, compassionate, competent man and lawyer. I’m thankful to Attorney Joe for this SECOND CHANCE at life and recommend him to anyone and everyone wanting to get off.

I am so deeply thankful to Attorney Joe Coimbra and his amazing law firm. He has represented me for many years. Being on the penal code 290 registry was nothing short of a never-ending nightmare for me. I met with one lawyer after the next, naysayers who said I would have to live as a penal code 290 registrant for the rest of my life and that getting off the registry just couldn’t be done. Then I met with Attorney Joe Coimbra, who was the first lawyer I felt really listen to me, really cared about what I had to say and the things I’ve been through having to live with the stigma of Megan‘s law and the registry. He cautioned me he couldn’t make any promises, but he would find a way for me to get off of the registry. As I write this with tears of joy streaming down my face, I thank God I met this incredible friend of the registrant community, Attorney Coimbra. He prepared for my case, like I’ve never seen anybody prepare for anything and filed my petition anticipating the government would try to get the court to turn down my case. HE WON AND I’M NOT ON THE REGISTRY ANYMORE! I have my life back and I’m able to work and be part of a society I was kept out of for so many years. Please please please don’t even think of having anybody else work on your case then Attorney Joe Coimbra. You won’t regret it.

Joe Coimbra, Esq. saved my life. Where other attorneys failed, Attorney Joe Coimbra succeeded. Not only did he file my petition for my removal from the sex offender registry, he also prepared in advance in case the district attorney wanted the court to stop me from getting off the registry. I wasn’t sure if this would be necessary but he was right and it’s a good thing I listened. The district attorney tried to delay things and they opposed my petition. reviews.text:
This is an ongoing development.

12/20 Update: Case manager was changed, which I appreciate. Will update when the case ends to give my final thoughts.

03/28 Update: Was assigned a new attorney that has me feeling much more confident, will update again ASAP.

Andrew is a very professional lawyer. I barely had to participate in the entire case. The lawyer would choose the options for me and I didn't have to worry about anything else. Extremely satisfied with Monica's professionalism and down to earth attitude,  anything I don't understand,  she takes the time to explain.  Workman's comp can be a mess, this firm though and especially Monica, have gone above and beyond to reassure me that everything's on track and going to be ok!  Grateful I chose them!

Monica Gonzalez and my attorney Daniel have both been great to work with. I would like to express my most sincere thanks for the most professional representation. They have supported me through the years in dealing with a very stressful case. Their work ethic and most of all excellent representation lead to winning our case and I couldn’t be more grateful.

"Unfortunately, I had a very negative experience with the law firm Liga Legal Scott Warmuth, specifically with my case manager, Monica Gonzalez.

My workers' compensation case was stalled for a long time, and instead of receiving help and solutions, I only received excuses and a lack of communication and action. Due to Monica Gonzalez's inaction, I lost my opportunity to receive necessary surgery because she did not appeal the denial, and my case was about to expire.

Fortunately, I was able to change representatives and find someone who truly cared about my case and worked honestly to resolve my problem.

I do not recommend anyone entrust their case to this law firm, especially if you are assigned to Monica Gonzalez... run away from there because with them, you will only experience failure in your case. There are many other law firms that truly care about their clients and work to achieve positive results."

" RESPONSE 2 TO YOUR COMMENT:

"Dear [Law Offices of Scott Warmuth],

I want to express my deepest disappointment and dissatisfaction with the service I received from your firm, specifically with the attention I received from Mónica González. After a year of waiting and no resolution to my case, I decided to seek a second opinion and hired a new attorney.

To my surprise, the new attorney was able to successfully resolve my case, obtaining the maximum possible compensation. This demonstrated to me that your firm is not equipped to handle cases effectively, and that you seem to favor the insurance company more than your clients' interests.

I recommend that you review your procedures and train your staff so they can provide more effective and ethical service. My experience with your firm was very negative, and I will not hesitate to share my story with others to prevent them from going through the same thing.

I hope you will take steps to improve your service and regain the trust of your clients."
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Valued Client,
We are sorry to hear about your experience. Our commitment is to help our clients receive the most appropriate workers' compensation treatment and the maximum compensation possible. At the same time, while providing professional advice, we respect our clients' choices and decisions.
As attorneys, we cannot interfere with medical evaluations and treatment recommendations made by medical professionals. We regret that the outcome of your case did not meet your expectations. If you still have questions about your case, please do not hesitate to contact us at 626-282-6868.

Like most folks, I am not up on lawyer talk and/or the big words you see on certain documents.  Erica is very easy to talk to and explained everything.  She took the time to make us feel comfortable during our misfortune.  Erica's hard work is true and her kindness is genuine -
she took time with us and we were not just another client to bill.
In our uncertain world these days, Erica is a breath of fresh air!
Should we ever need legal aid again, we will call on her again!
Excellent lawyer and incredibly helpful. Thank you again

This review is for Erica at Madrid Law Firm. Without getting too into my DUI case, I had a special circumstance conviction. She was able to get me the best possible deal from the DA. I truly believe that! Felony dropped to a misdemeanor, bail amount decreased. She was very informative and responded in a timely matter. It was never difficult to reach her and she took the time to explain all my questions. I never got the feeling I was bugging her-- and that matters when determining your attorney!  She knows what she is doing, took care of all the DMV matters for me. I highly recommend her, very trustworthy!!
Erika Madrid defended 2 of my DUIs and she has been the only lawyer I have ever hired that was actually worth every penny. I totally recommend her!

Adriana and her team were absolutely amazing. They acted quickly and professionally to help us address and resolve false negative comments made by a broker that were affecting our business. Thanks to their expertise and support, the issue was resolved within 48 hours. We truly appreciate their dedication and highly recommend Adriana and her team.

Cornerstone Law Corporation provided outstanding legal support for our company. They successfully helped us remove a malicious and inaccurate broker flag on the Highway platform, which had a significant impact on our operations. Their team was highly professional, responsive, and knowledgeable about transportation and carrier compliance matters. We truly appreciate their expertise and dedication, and we highly recommend them to any transportation or logistics company needing reliable legal counsel.
Best attorney and staff efficient and quick to return calls
It was everything I anticipated and more

I highly recommend Cornerstone Law for your legal needs. Attorney James Hornbuckle explained throughly what options I had to resolve my legal issues.  Case Manager Adriana Sandoval was my main contact. Whenever I had questions or concerns she would patiently walk me through the process. They are a great team to have on your side.

I recently had a one hour consultation with attorney, James Hornbuckle. James was extremely informative about my financial options. He walked me through several scenarios regarding my situation. I never once felt pressured or hurried during our one hour meeting. He is the consummate professional and I will definitely be retaining his services. Thank you, James!

James Hornbuckle (attorney) and Adriana Sandoval (paralegal) are a great team! They are very informative and helpful. This was my first bankruptcy and with the help of Cornerstone Law, it was a breeze. I was given the runaround and bad information from a couple of law firms when I was shopping for an attorney. When I called and spoke to Adriana, she was very helpful and empathized with my situation. She was truthful and the process went just how she described. James Hornbuckle arrived to the hearing early and met us before we had to go in. He prepped us on what to expect and within an hour, the bankruptcy was approved. I am very happy with Cornerstone Law and will gladly refer my friends and family to them.

I am sharing my experience to warn other mothers and families. This office demonstrates a dangerous lack of diligence that has put my children’s stability at risk. Mr. Quiñones and his staff failed to verify basic financial records, allowing the opposing party to hide significant income and assets. Because they did not check the facts, my family has been forced into unnecessary instability. It is heartbreaking to see a legal professional enable this kind of behavior through pure negligence. If you are looking for an office that will actually protect your children's best interests and verify the truth, look elsewhere.

As a social worker and professional advocate, I am conducting a due diligence audit of this firm’s practices regarding California Rules of Professional Conduct (CRPC) Rule 3.3. My review indicates a significant failure in the duty of candor toward the tribunal. Specifically, this office has demonstrated a consistent lack of diligence in verifying financial declarations, submitting documents that are directly contradicted by immediate banking metadata. This level of professional negligence impacts the integrity of judicial proceedings and puts vulnerable families at risk. I advise extreme caution and independent verification of all claims submitted by this office.
Mr. Quñones has been an experienced attorney for many years. Professional, friendly, and very thorough.
Gilbert is amazing! He is what you won't find in most lawyers, and that is someone who truly cares about you and your case.

reviews.text:
I had an outstanding experience working with LaShine Law APC for my NIW petition.

With a background as a Ph.D. in Computer Security, 80+ academic citations, and a senior engineering role at a major tech company, I applied for NIW with premium processing. Unfortunately, I received an RFE questioning all key points — the national importance of my work, the uniqueness of my contributions, and the proof of actual impact.

LaShine Law helped me thoroughly rebuild my case. They guided me in restructuring the narrative to connect my technical work with broader industry and national interests. We added strong new letters of recommendation (including from recognized experts) and submitted additional evidence, including federal adoption of my work.

Thanks to their expert strategy, my petition was approved just 24 hours after we submitted the RFE response.

I truly appreciate LaShine Law’s professionalism, responsiveness, and deep expertise in immigration law. They made a stressful process manageable and ultimately successful. Highly recommended!

reviews.text:
I honestly can’t say enough good things about Preferred Legal Services. From the very first phone call, J and Steven Lopez treated me and my family with respect, patience, and genuine concern. We were stuck in a really bad lease agreement with a slumlord and felt completely overwhelmed. It was stressful, frustrating, and honestly scary not knowing what our options were.

J and Steven stepped in and handled everything with confidence and professionalism. They explained our rights clearly, kept us informed every step of the way, and fought hard for us. You can tell they truly care about the people they represent — not just the case. They didn’t make empty promises; they put in the work.

Because of their dedication and persistence, we were able to get out of a terrible situation and move forward with peace of mind. That meant everything to my wife, my kids, and me. When you’re dealing with housing issues, it’s not just paperwork — it’s your family’s stability. They understood that.

If you’re dealing with a landlord dispute or feel stuck in a lease you shouldn’t be in, call Preferred Legal Services. Ask for Jay and Steven Lopez. They are hardworking, honest, and they show up when it matters. Amazing father and son duo!

Thank you both again for everything you did for my family. We truly appreciate you
Highly recommend. Jay, thank you so much for your help. I really appreciate it.

Overheard a real sharply dressed go getter in tailored pants, vest and dress shirt,convey options and information to his client, in the halls of Superior Court, West Covina. The following day  he was asking questions of the clerk in the next window from where I was, eavesdropping. from. The clerks were familiar with him and quite friendly to his disposition..  My good friend joined me at clerk’s window .  She suggested I hire  him as my attorney.He sure knows his stuff. We asked around , then ended up at his family run ,  professional office for a FREE consultation . We hired Preferred Services  and was and am extremely blown away by  the level of knowledge skill, finesse,communication and professionalism  his entire staff  possessed  as their way of doing business each day. My case ended well, thanks to Preferred Services. My case was finished , but I had to return to their office to pick up an item. That’s when I witnessed how amazing and funny and lighthearted, the office staff was with each other. After all, they are a family that respects and likes one another, resulting in super powers like kicking ass for their clients. I Highly recommend them  Make sure Preferred Services is top of your list . You will breathe a sigh of relief after your FREE consultation.Tell them all I said Hello.😃
You need the job done, don’t look any further they got the dog in them and they get it done. Thank you Jay and steve for helping me and my family out of a difficult situation.
Used them to help me file for a divorce. Marie was very helpful and understanding. Was also able to have a attorney represent me for court appearances.

We’re so glad we chose their services and couldn’t be happier with the results. From the very start, they were open and transparent about their services and pricing—and it truly was the best deal around. They took the time to walk us through the entire process, which we really appreciated. Steven was amazing and Jay was wonderful—both were incredibly helpful from beginning to end. We definitely recommend them!

It's a real headache (your blood pressure will skyrocket) when you have a tenant who delays or pays rent in installments (the contract is for a one-time monthly payment), but you've also heard how difficult it is to evict an irresponsible tenant. We were lucky to find Preferred Services, and the team of Jay, Steven, and Lisa worked seamlessly and very quickly; we got our house back in less than ten days. Of course, everyone's situation is different, but Preferred Services is a company I have 100% confidence and trust in. I would recommend their service and capabilities to all my friends who own property. Don't be afraid when you encounter unreasonable tenants; remember Preferred Services, you won't be disappointed.

Preferred Services in West Covina is an outstanding place for anyone seeking help with renting issues. It’s a family run business with great people. From the office manager Lisa to the dynamic father and son team of Jay  and Steve you can find no one better. They helped me to evict a tenant who was not paying rent  and resolved the issue quickly and efficiently with fairness for everyone. They are truly amazing and I recommend them in the highest possible terms. Thanks Jay, Lisa and Steve!

Preferred Services is absolutely worth hiring if you are a tenant dealing with slumlords and facing an unfair eviction in El Monte, CA.

After 14 years of being outstanding, long-term tenants, our slumlords repeatedly ignored repair requests and then tried to evict my family with a false notice for their own personal gain. In February 2025, I knew I needed legal help quickly—and that’s when I found Preferred Services in West Covina.

Jay and Steve are a dynamic duo who deliver results. They held our slumlords accountable, made sure long-overdue repairs were addressed legally, and secured time for my family to remain in the home rent-free. They didn’t just handle the case—they also checked in on us regularly, showing genuine care and concern. Their fees were affordable, and the outcome was truly priceless.

Communication with Jay and Steve Lopez was always professional and responsive. They answered every question, kept me informed step by step, and made the entire process less stressful. When necessary, their attorneys stepped in to finish the case, leading to a solid victory.

At my first consultation, I was told they could likely secure four months of extra time rent-free. In the end, they achieved seven months, ensured our eviction record was sealed, and even helped with moving assistance.

I can’t thank Jay and Steve Lopez, and attorney Jeanne enough for protecting my family from slumlords and giving us the time, support, and outcome we needed. I highly recommend Preferred Services and would use them again if needed.

Wait no more — Jay and Steven are absolutely the best! I’m so glad I reached out to Preferred Services to represent me in evicting a tenant who stopped paying rent and illegally & unethically subleased my property to profit off it by renting to complete strangers...

We took the case to court and went all the way — and won. Jay’s team and the attorney were exceptionally professional, knowledgeable, and reassuring throughout the entire process. From the start, they were confident we had a strong case, and they delivered exactly as promised.  Jay didn't kid around, he meant business!

I highly recommend Preferred Services to any frustrated landlords dealing with non-paying tenants or illegal subleasing. Let the real pros handle it right from the start — you’ll save yourself a lot of time, stress, and headaches.

Wow! Preferred Services were extremely helpful in my situation. Wiped out a huge debt on my behalf.  I am so grateful and want to HIGHLY recommend Jay and Steven Lopez. They have a great heart for the people…and I am so relieved!! God bless you guys!

An Amazing Team!!!

Steve and Jay were very professional. These gentlemen mean busyness!!!! I had a tenant threatened me with hiring an attorney after I had first provided a notice to vacate thinking I would be able to handle this situation myself. This tenant also claimed he had contacted a legal aid organization and tried to prevent me from accessing the property. Jay posted the first official “10 Day” notice of violation the same day I visited their office. We had official eviction court documents in little over 30 days after the initial notice. These guys definitely know how to handle every scenario preventing and avoiding possible tactic tricks from these types of tenants. My most sincere Thanks to Steve, Jay and the entire team. May God continue to bless you guys.

A. Figueroa
Go no where else your in good hands with the Preferred services!

Mr. Jay and Steve Lopez execute professional and precise service. They carry themselves ethically and really engage with the client showing empathy and also ensure to give the client the best outcome. Highly recommend Preferred Services to everyone.

From our first meeting to the final resolution, a successful jury trial with Mike Earle, everything took about three months. Throughout the entire process, Jay was incredibly communicative. He ensured that every notice was properly documented, took photos of each posting, kept records, and provided timely updates on any new developments.

In my case, the tenant requested a jury trial, which added complexity and required extensive preparation. Lisa Marie did an outstanding job preparing the trial documents, making sure everything was in order. With Mike’s expertise in the courtroom, I won the jury trial! This wouldn’t have been possible without the entire team. I highly recommend their services to anyone dealing with an eviction case or legal matter.

If you or anyone you know  are ever in need of any paralegal services or or help dealing with any type of eviction situations whether your a tenant or a landlord ,  Preffered services is the place to go, Jay Lopez is the man with a plan, & even if  he personally can’t help u in a certain situation he will definitely go out of his way best reffer you to the person who will be able to provide you the services you need , to top it off for the type of services he does provide he is definitely  not pricey , he made me feel safe and confident when dealing with my eviction, he handled EVERYTHING AND WHEN I SAY EVERYTHING I MEAN EVERYTHING I HAD NOTHING TO STRESS ABOUT CAUSE I KNEW HE HAD MY BACK, he was able to get me to stay a few months longer at no cost , no eviction on my record, and I was able to save up even more and was able to find a better place for my kids and I, thank god I was able to meet this man he’s been so helpful and is always ready to help you in any way shape or form , definitely worth every cent I spent on acquiring him to handle my case!!!

If you are in a serious situation and need to apply for disability, you will find that social security will tell you thanks for applying, you will hear back in 6-7 months. I received a questionnaire after 7 months and got an appointment for a social security doctor after 9 months. I'm positive I'm not the only person in this position.

On a side note, I tried self help and the free 20 min lawyer. I got a bunch of bad advice. If I had not talked to the landlord's attorney or filed the unlawful detainer myself, I would have had 60 more days to move out. Steve did still get my back rent gone. Call Steve first and let him handle it. Don't mess up your options doing it alone from the beginning.

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your trust. We are glad our team can help you with your car accident and personal injury claims. Actually, instead of dealing directly with the insurance company, we use a contingency fee arrangement for personal injury cases like car accidents. Having a lawyer handle it saves time and effort, and because we understand insurance regulations and know how to deal with insurance companies, the compensation we receive is often several times higher than if we went directly with the insurance company. Our car accident cases are handled personally from start to finish by our lawyer, Chris Hyatt. Insurance companies know we are professional lawyers, not just a group of legal assistants, so they are less likely to handle cases carelessly, resulting in better compensation compared to other law firms.

reviews.text: A few months ago, I was unfortunately rear-ended on the highway. Luckily, through a friend, I found Deng Hong Law Firm to assist with my personal injury claim. They also helped me notify my car insurance company and get everything sorted out. I will recommend them to friends who might need assistance!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Mr. Zhao. It's a pleasure to handle your car accident claim. The biggest difference between our firm and other personal injury or car accident claims law firms is that in handling car accident and serious injury claims, from the moment we take on a case to the final settlement (including repair and personal injury claims), our cases are handled personally by our lawyers. Other law firms typically have one lawyer (or someone using a lawyer's license so the client can't see the lawyer) with a dozen or so assistants. All contact with the insurance company is handled by the assistants, making it impossible for the insurance company's claims personnel to speak with the lawyer. Insurance companies also know who's dealing with them; when they realize their opponent is a lawyer, not an assistant, they often don't dare to play games and directly make reasonable compensation according to the law. Thank you for your trust. We will continue to provide the best legal services to our community using our model.

reviews.text: My parents and I were involved in a car accident where we were hit by a DUI driver. Chris was amazing in explaining everything to us and getting things resolved as smoothly and quickly as possible. Thank you again to the Daniel Deng Law Office.
reviews.ownerResponse: It is very important that we drive defensively. There are a lot of DUI drivers out there. Another advice is that it is important that we purhcase UM insurance when we buy our auto insurance. Most DUI drivers have minimal 15/30 liability insurance or have no insurance. Many DUI accidents involve serious injury. With UM (uninsured motorist，or underinsured motorist) insurance, your own insurance can help to pay for the damages.

reviews.ownerResponse: Piti, divorce is usually not resolved overnight. When you retained our office, we filed the initial divorce papers on your behalf and immediately began settlement discussions in hopes to reduce your attorney fees with our office. Unfortunately, the two of you could not reach an agreement. Instead, she acted against the ATROs which we spent a significant amount of time to get you access to accounts she blocked you from. Additionally, we prepared and filed a Request for Order to get you access to those accounst along with other requests. After which, your case was in the discovery process where we had many responses to prepare on your behalf. So to say nothing was done is a misstatement of what actually occurred. I can understand your frustration as divorce is never easy to go through. Handling divorce cases for the past 13 years, it has provided me with the insight to have empathy for my clients and understand if they become impatient or short fused. It is unfortunate you feel "nothing was done" as we all diligently worked on your case. Because at Mohajer Law Firm, you're never "just a client". You become part of this family. I hope you find the expeditious movement on your case with your new counsel. I wish you nothing but the best.

reviews.text:
Mohajer Law Firm has been outstanding in handling my case. I filed for divorce in 2021 and tried to handle everything myself, thinking it would be a straightforward process, with my ex getting everything—house, money, spousal support, child support—and I walked away with most of the debt. This was our original agreement. The ex left the marriage with over $200,000 in cash and valuables, I left with over $200,000 in debt.

I thought everything was final until I was blindsided by my ex and her newly hired attorney, who weren’t satisfied and decided they wanted even more. I didn’t have a lawyer at the time and they were trying to railroad me. That’s when I reached out to Mohajer Law Firm—and it was the best decision I could’ve made.

They took on my case and after years of fighting, we won. Mohajer and his team moved quickly and managed to have the original MSA thrown out. Everything restarted, but this time I had evidence, and with the help of Lorenzo and Sina, we were able to prove I was actually owed over $78,000 from my ex.

Lorenzo helped me track down and understand all the necessary documents. He answered every question promptly and professionally. Sina was just as responsive and was always prepared when we had to go to court.

What we all thought was a simple divorce turned into a nightmare, but the Mohajer team stood by me the entire time—keeping me informed, explaining court schedules, and helping me stay on top of everything. They did an excellent job, and I highly recommend them.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Adam,

Thank you so much for your honest review. I pleases me so much to learn how satisfied you were with our services in light of the nightmare of a case you had to deal with. I am happy that it is all behind you finally and you can continue to live your life in peace!

Should you ever need anything further, please do not hesitate to reach out to us.

All the best,
Sina

I was injured at my workplace and first tried to handle the worker's compensation process on my own. After a few excruciating weeks of dealing with leaves of absence, treatment rejections, countless emails, phone calls, and urgent care visits, I read the reviews on Joseph and decided to give him a call.

From our first point of contact, Joe was knowledgeable and transparent detailing potential paths forward. His experience and understanding in both plaintiff and defense work gave me confidence in him. I fully trusted him with my case. Immediately, he got me access to the treatments I needed, and when my workplace wasn't able to accommodate me, he made sure the worker's compensation insurance company made up for it.

Even when I moved out of state, I was at peace knowing Joseph was handling my case. He made sure I continued to receive treatments and physical therapy out-of-state and coordinated my necessary doctor's appointments in California.

When the defense deposed me, Joe spent time to prepare me and calm my nerves so that I could go into the deposition with confidence.

When my employer called me back to work in California, Joseph, using his knowledge of employment law, advised me on how to secure a transfer to a location near my new home.

Finally, Joe coordinated a final medical evaluation with an AME and skillfully negotiated a final package for me with the defense lawyers, navigating complicated personal disability levels and occupation codes.

Overall, my case was long and complicated but the whole time Joseph was dedicated and worked very hard for me!

For those that are considering having Joseph Lee represent them for worker's compensation or employment law, don't hesitate to have him! The worker's compensation process can be complicated and isolating, having Joe in your corner makes things so much easier.

Chris’s professionalism, kindness, and honesty, really set my mind at ease knowing no matter what, I had a lawyer that was going to fight tooth and nail for me, and as the DA drug their feet, over, and over, and over again, Chris never faltered. This case took over a year to settle, and Chris was there to push them every step of the way. His knowledge of the law and courtroom acumen was amazing to watch. As a first time offender in a notoriously strict county, I was not sure of anything, and scared that I would be taken away from my wife and 5year old son at the time.
